LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES, LP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT THAT, AS TO AND WITHIN EACH CAUSE ACTION ALLEGED, THE PLAINTIFFS ALLEGE SPECIFIC FACTS SUPPORTING EACH ELEMENT OF THAT CAUSE OF ACTION. THE MANNER IN WHICH THE COMPLAINT IS NOW WRITTEN MAKES IT IMPOSSIBLE TO KNOW WHAT ALLEGED FACTS PURPORTEDLY APPLY TO WHICH CAUSE OF ACTION AND EACH ELEMENT OF THAT CAUSE OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2011 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Michael Burke, Esq., from Cathedral Hill Associates, LP, 415-398-0200, for Defendant and moving party

No other appearance, Tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES, LP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with twenty days leave to amend to file an amended complaint that, as to and within each cause action alleged, the plaintiffs allege specific facts supporting each element of that cause of action. The manner in which the complaint is now written makes it impossible to know what alleged facts purportedly apply to which cause of action and each element of that cause of action. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages As Well As References To Statutory Damages Alleged In Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Michael Burke, Esq., from Cathedral Hill Associates, LP, 415-398-0200, for Defendant and moving party

No other appearance, Tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANT CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES, LP Motion To Strike Punitive Damages As Well As References To Statutory Damages Alleged In Complaint is off calendar due to the ruling on the demurrer. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
